title: ConfirmMessageType
description: The confirm message contains the processing results for the corresponding request.  A request may have its processing reported as: succeeded, partially failed, or failed.

messageID.description: An identifier for the instance of the confirm message

messageDateTime.description: The date & time that the confirm message instance was created

requestID.description: The identifier for the request to which a confirm message is related.  In the asynchronous processing case, this identifier may be used to refer to the processing job that is servicing a request

requestProcessingStatusCode.description: The processing results status code for the request

requestResultStatusCode.description: The processing results status code for the request

messages.description: Processing messages related to the request; multiple messages may be communicated about the request

resourceMessages.description: Resource messages contain the resource-specific processing results for resources being managed in the request. In the case of a request that manages multiple resources, each array item would correspond to one of the resources

resourceId.description: An identifier for a resource in the request

resourceResultStatusCode.description: The processing results status code for a resource

messages.description: Processing messages related to the resource; multiple messages may be communicated about a resource
